query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Wintry', 'Suggestive or characteristic of winter, cold, stormy', 'The essay highlights the wintry of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Wiry', 'Thin, muscular and flexible', 'Scholars noted a striking wiry between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Wispy', 'Like a slender, flexible strand or bundle', 'Her wispy became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Wistful', 'Showing a feeling of vague or regretful longing', 'What seemed wistful at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Wither', 'To shrivel', 'Critics argued that the plan might wither the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Witl', 'A person who feigns wit, pretending or aspiring to be witty', 'Over time, the community learned to witl its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Witticism', 'A witty remark, a quip', 'Scholars noted a striking witticism between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Witty', 'Amusingly clever in perception and expression', 'Scholars noted a striking witty between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Wizen', 'To become wrinkled by shrinkage as from age or illness', 'Over time, the community learned to wizen its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Wraith', 'A ghost or specter', 'The essay highlights the wraith of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Wrangle', 'To bicker, or quarrel angrily and noisily', 'Over time, the community learned to wrangle its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Wrath', 'Strong or fierce anger', 'Scholars noted a striking wrath between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Wreak', 'To inflict, especially if causing harm or injury', 'Over time, the community learned to wreak its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Wrench', 'To twist suddenly and forcibly', 'Critics argued that the plan might wrench the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Wrest', 'To pull or twist violently', 'Over time, the community learned to wrest its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Wretchedness', 'An unhappy state of mental or physical suffering', 'Scholars noted a striking wretchedness between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Writhe', 'To twist or turn so as to distort, to wring', 'Critics argued that the plan might writhe the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Wry', 'Using dry or mocking humor', 'The essay highlights the wry of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Xenophobia', 'An unreasonable fear of strangers or foreigners', 'Scholars noted a striking xenophobia between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Yearl', 'An animal that is between one and two years old', 'Scholars noted a striking yearl between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Yearn', 'To have earnest or strong desire', 'Critics argued that the plan might yearn the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Yield', 'To produce or give way', '“The experiment yielded promising results.”', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Yoke', 'A device for joining together a pair of draft animals', 'Scholars noted a striking yoke between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Zany', 'Ludicrously or incongruously comical', 'The essay highlights the zany of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Zeal', 'Great energy or enthusiasm in pursuit of a cause', 'Scholars noted a striking zeal between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Zealot', 'A fanatic', 'Scholars noted a striking zealot between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Zealous', 'Showing great passion or energy', 'What seemed zealous at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Zeitgeist', 'A trend of thought characteristic of a particular time', 'Her zeitgeist became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Zenith', 'The highest point reached by something', 'Her zenith became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Zephyr', 'A gentle, mild breeze', 'Scholars noted a striking zephyr between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Zodiac', 'An astrological system', 'The essay highlights the zodiac of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Zodiacal', 'Of or pertaining to the zodiac', 'The author hoped the new policy would zodiacal tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
